name: slsk-mcp
description: MCP server for Soulseek network access. Exposes search, browse, and download operations via MCP tool calls.
safety: Only download files with explicit user confirmation.
Credentials must be in env vars, never in prompts or code.
Respect Soulseek network etiquette; do not spam searches.
notes: Requires a running Soulseek account. Replace placeholder env vars before use.
